name: Yangtze Finless Porpoise
conservationEfforts: Semi-natural reserves established in Yangtze oxbow lakes. Fishing bans implemented in key sections of the river. China declared 10-year fishing moratorium on the Yangtze in 2021.
description: The only freshwater porpoise remaining since the extinction of the baiji dolphin. Known for its perpetual smile-like expression and high intelligence.
